plan.spec: See implementation_plan.md in gemini/brain for root cause analysis

phase.name: 1: Fix TagInput Input Can't Be Typed

task.name: Replace PopoverTrigger with PopoverAnchor in TagInput
task.action: In `src/components/shared/TagInput.tsx`: 1. Change import: replace `PopoverTrigger` with `PopoverAnchor` from `@/components/ui/popover`. 2. Replace `PopoverTrigger asChild` (line 130) with `PopoverAnchor asChild`. 3. Replace closing `PopoverTrigger` (line 143) with `PopoverAnchor`. 4. Add `onBlur` handler to the `Input`: `onBlur={() => setTimeout(() => setOpen(false), 150)}` — the delay allows clicking items inside the popover before it closes. 5. Change the `onFocus` handler to `onFocus={() => setOpen(true)}` so the dropdown opens immediately on focus, showing existing tags even before typing.
task.verify: Run `npm run build` — must pass with no type errors. Run `npx vitest run src/components/shared/TagInput.test.tsx` — must pass. Manually test: navigate to a create transaction form, click the tag input, type "test" — text must appear and dropdown must show.

phase.name: 2: Add Editable Tags Column to Expense Table

task.name: Add TagInput-powered tags column to ExpenseTable
task.verify: Run `npm run build` — must pass with no type errors.

phase.name: 3: Add Editable Tags Column to Income Table

task.name: Add TagInput-powered tags column to IncomeTable
task.action: Apply the same pattern as Phase 2 to `src/components/tables/income/IncomeTable.tsx`: 1. Import `Badge` and `TagInput`. 2. Add the `TagsCell` component. 3. Add tags column to column definitions. 4. Widen `updateData` value type to `any`. 5. Add `tagIds` to `saveRow` payload.
task.verify: Run `npm run build` — must pass with no type errors.

phase.name: 4: Add Editable Tags Column to Transfer Table

task.name: Add TagInput-powered tags column to TransferTable
task.action: Apply the same pattern as Phase 2 to `src/components/tables/transfers/TransferTable.tsx`: 1. Import `Badge` and `TagInput`. 2. Add the `TagsCell` component. 3. Add tags column to column definitions. 4. Widen `updateData` value type to `any`. 5. Add `tagIds` to `saveRow` payload.
task.verify: Run `npm run build` — must pass with no type errors.

task.name: Run full test suite and manual smoke test
task.action: 1. Run `npx vitest run` — all existing test files must pass. 2. Run `npm run build` — must compile successfully. 3. Run `npm run lint` — no new warnings. 4. Manual tests: a. Open create expense drawer → Tags input → type "Bangkok" → text appears, dropdown shows → create tag → pill appears b. Open create income drawer → Tags input → type text → works c. Desktop table → Expenses → Tags column visible with pills for tagged transactions d. Click edit (pencil) on a row → TagInput appears in the Tags cell → add a new tag → save → tag persists e. Click edit on an OLD transaction with no tags → add a tag via TagInput → save → tag saved f. Verify same for Income and Transfer tables
task.verify: All automated and manual checks pass.
